title: Zucchini Spaghetti
description: Tender cooked zucchini tossed in smooth marinara sauce and finished with Parmesan. A light and satisfying dinner.

steps.instruction: Peel zucchini completely. Dice into rough ½-inch cubes.
Steam or boil for 10–12 minutes until completely soft.
Drain well. Using a fork or potato masher, mash the zucchini until broken into small irregular bits. Do not puree — keep some texture.
Heat olive oil or butter in a skillet over medium-low. Add mashed zucchini and cook 2 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Add smooth marinara sauce, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Stir and heat through.
The dish should be moist and well-coated with sauce — add 1–2 tbsp water or broth if too thick.
Top with finely grated Parmesan before serving.

notes: Use a smooth marinara sauce for the best result — chunky tomato sauces with big vegetable pieces change the texture completely.
